text.title: Creational Design Patterns Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how creational-patterns produces a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path application
example.code:
--- artefact_id: creational-pattern-payment-2026-05-23 owner: Ruslan Faion <ruslan@faion.net> ---
## Hotspot `payments.create_processor` — variants per provider (stripe, paypal, wise).
## Pattern Abstract Factory — returns a family of (Charger, Refunder, Reporter) per provider.
```python class PaymentFactory(Protocol): def charger(self) -> Charger: ... def refunder(self) -> Refunder: ... def reporter(self) -> Reporter: ...
class StripeFactory: ... class PaypalFactory: ... class WiseFactory: ...
FACTORIES: dict[str, type[PaymentFactory]] = { "stripe": StripeFactory, "paypal": PaypalFactory, "wise": WiseFactory, } ```
## DI scope - request (each request resolves the active provider).
## Anti-misuse note Not Factory Method (single product) — we need three coordinated products per provider.
example.note: Demonstrates the rules from 01-core-rules.xml applied to a concrete input; output validates against the schema in 02-output-contract.xml.
